title: Monday Doc field appearing in Export but doc column was deleted from board
excerpt: Hi I had a monday doc on my board but then deleted the column from the board. When I do exports this column is appearing even though I deleted the column from the board. Is there a way to have it stop appearing on my exp…

posts.author: MsGreene (Dominique Greene)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi I had a monday doc on my board but then deleted the column from the board. When I do exports this column is appearing even though I deleted the column from the board. Is there a way to have it stop appearing on my exports?

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @MsGreene has it been deleted from the Main Table? If it has, you could try duplicating the board, and then trying an export.

posts.author: MsGreene (Dominique Greene)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bruce, thank you for responding. Yes it was deleted from the Main table. I will try duplicating the board thank you for the suggestion.

posts.author: MsGreene (Dominique Greene)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BruceGosk i tried duplicating the board and even though the field is no longer on the table it’s still coming over in the duplicated table, so that did not solve the issues unfortunately.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Am stumped, you may have to contact support for this one, who will most likely ask if developers are allowed to access your account (may take a while depending on their queue of tickets). Other option is to make the board from scratch, and move all the items to it though this could be a lot of effort depending on how built out it is.

posts.author: MsGreene (Dominique Greene)
posts.cookedHtml: @BruceGosk thank you for trying. Yes that would be a lot of work it just took me a day to fix all my automations, dashboards, and mirror boards to duplicating the board. I will see about putting in a ticket until then I guess I will continue to use my formatting macros to remove it and will be weary of adding any other monday.com docs columns to the board. Thank you for attempting to help! I appreciate it.
